summary: Design QA: audited canvas implementation vs token specs. Fixed 15+ discrepancies including missing CSS variables (viewport zoom/snap, edge metadata, handle border-width, minimap layout, node gap), corrected keyframe animations (node-enter bounce, running-pulse glow spread, error-pulse glow spread), added edge-draw animation, synced Tailwind theme. Added 79 QA tests validating token/CSS/Tailwind consistency.
